name: Paige's Favorite Chinese Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Liquid Butter Buds (made from the mix)
1 1/4 cups Campbell's Healthy Request fat-free chicken broth
2 cups Cooked, cubed white chicken meat (without skin)
2 cans Water chestnuts; sliced; rinsed and drained
1 can Campbell's 99% fat-free Healthy Request Cream of Chicken soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Spray a 9.5- x 13-inch casserole dish with Pam Cooking Spray.
3. In a saucepan, blend Liquid Butter Buds, 1/4 cup flour, 1/4 cup chicken broth, lite salt (if using), and pepper over low heat.
4. Stir and cook until bubbly.
5. Add the rest of the broth and evaporated skimmed milk to the saucepan. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly.
6. Boil for one minute.
7. Stir in the Cream of Chicken soup and drained water chestnuts.
8. Add the cooked cubed chicken.
9. Pour the mixture into the prepared casserole dish.
10. Cover with foil and bake for 25-30 minutes.
11. Serve alone or over fluffy rice or pasta, if desired.
12. Yields: 10 to 12 servings.
